title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hindustan Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hindustan Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!
